title: Luxury 4BHK Villa — Jubilee Hills
description: Independent 4BHK villa with landscaped garden, modular kitchen, and 24/7 security. Walkable to malls and schools in Jubilee Hills.
image_credit: Indu Fortune Fields Gardenia high-rises — HiTech belt, Hyderabad photo (2015). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 3.0 (Nikhil B). Demonstration listing only.

title: Premium 3BHK Apartment — Banjara Hills Road No.12
description: High-floor 3BHK with city views, clubhouse, gym, covered parking and power backup.
image_credit: Indu Fortune Fields Gardenia high-rises — HiTech belt, Hyderabad photo (2015). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 3.0 (Nikhil B). Demonstration listing only.

title: 2BHK IT Corridor — Madhapur
description: Bright 2BHK near cafes and coworking hubs. Ideal for tech professionals — fibre-ready society with backup.
image_credit: Hyatt Hyderabad roadside, auto-rickshaw, Gachibowli corridor (2023). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0 (Wasiul Bahar). Demonstration listing only.

title: Duplex Villa — Gachibowli
description: G+1 duplex close to offices and ORR ramps. Terrace garden, solar hot water, 3-car parking.
image_credit: Gachibowli flyover, Hyderabad (2019–20). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0 (Adbh266). Demonstration listing only.

title: Affordable 1BHK Studio — Kukatpally
description: Compact 1BHK near metro corridor and colleges. Childrens play area and 24-hour security.
image_credit: Marina Skies towers, Diwali night, Kukatpally, Hyderabad (2022). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0 (iMahesh). Demonstration listing only.

title: 3BHK Gated Villa — Kompally
description: North-east facing 3BHK in gated community with clubhouse, courts, and jogging track.
image_credit: NTR Gardens, Necklace Road / Hussain Sagar, Hyderabad (2021). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0 (Faismeen). Demonstration listing only.

title: Heritage Bungalow — Secunderabad
description: Spacious bungalow on corner plot — high ceilings, private garden, easy access to railways and arterial roads.
image_credit: Secunderabad Junction (2012). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0 (Superfast1111). Demonstration listing only.

title: High-Rise 2BHK — Kokapet / Financial District
description: Tower apartment with concierge, pool deck, lake-view balconies. Suitable for EMI-friendly luxury buyers.
image_credit: TCS Synergy Park, Gachibowli, Hyderabad (2021). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0 (Nskjnv). Demonstration listing only.

title: Residential Plot — Tellapur Growth Corridor
description: Corner plot in evolving residential belt between ORR and IT hubs. Boundary wall-ready; Vaastu-friendly orientation.
image_credit: Active agricultural soils / crops documented in rural India (2025). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 4.0 (MeriPyaariPrakriti). Plot photo is illustrative, not surveyed cadastral imagery.

title: Commercial-Ready Plot — Shamshabad Link Road
description: Mixed-use zoning potential minutes from airport access road. Suitable for warehousing or showroom subject to approvals.
image_credit: Rajiv Gandhi International Airport terminal area, Shamshabad, Hyderabad Region (2011). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0 (Premkudva). Demonstration listing only.

title: Budget 2BHK — Miyapur Metro Belt
description: Metro-linked 2BHK with podium parking, departmental store on ground floor, and rainwater harvesting.
image_credit: Hyderabad panorama (cropped skyline from Wiki Loves Monuments 2013 assets). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0. Demonstration listing only.

title: Investment Land — Shankarpally Outskirts
description: Larger tract ideal for farmhouse or phased villa development — verify conversion with authorities before booking.
image_credit: Sunrise over Hussain Sagar, Hyderabad (2010). Sankarshansen, public domain on Wikimedia Commons. Demonstration listing only.

title: Sky Penthouse — HITEC City
description: Duplex penthouse with private terraces, automation-ready wiring, concierge and sky lounge amenities.
image_credit: TCS Synergy Park, Gachibowli, Hyderabad (2021). Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0 (Nskjnv). Demonstration listing only.

title: 3BHK New Launch — Uppal ORR Knot
description: Under-construction tower with skyline deck, co-working nook, indoor games and EV-ready parking slots.
image_credit: Rotary Tank Bund gardens beside Hussain Sagar, Hyderabad (2008). Cephas 405 via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 3.0 / GFDL. Demonstration listing only.
